title: Metaworlds Unofficial
description: An Unofficial Continuation of the Metaworlds Mod
body:
**About**

This is an unofficial port and continuation of the old Metaworlds Mod to Minecraft Forge 1.7.10. 

 

Installation

    Install Minecraft 1.7.10 with the latest Forge version
    Download and move the latest jar file from this mod's files into the mods folder
    You might (but not always) have to install extra dependencies as specified in https://github.com/jblas-project/jblas/wiki/Missing-Libraries

 

Features

    Create fully functioning worlds within worlds!
    These worlds are fully functioning and editable at all time just like the normal world, all normal block mechanics should work in metaworlds too!
    There's no size limit as metaworlds use world logics and loads as chunks!
    You can move on them while they are in motion!
    Metaworlds are also rotatable and scalable!
    Quickly align and flip metaworlds with special blocks!
    Reintegrate metaworlds with the normal world using the metaworlds reintegrator block!
    All crafting recipes are customizable within autogenerated config files!

 

Improvements (from original version)

    Ported to 1.7.10
    There is no longer an installer and two mods you need to download separately
    Fixed damage taken on subworlds not being shown
    Fixed not being able to die while on a subworld (even in survival)


**Old Mod Review**

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_g6wvB76J3k

F.A.Q

 

Q: When port to version x.x.x?

A: Probably never, unless you want to do it yourself, of course.

 

Q: Modpacks?

A: Of course! No need to ask.

 

Q: There is a crash! / This mod doesn't work with X! / I found a bug!

A: You can always report it on the issue tracker and I'll try and take a look.
